tasks.title: HF-1 — Customer attach dropdown search
tasks.goal: Customer attach dropdown search uses shared rep-book matching plus debounced workspace-wide fallback for companies outside the first local customer page.
verification: bun run segment:gates --segment B5.2-hf-1-customer-attach-dropdown-search --ui (clean temp worktree)
tasks.notes: Main working tree had unrelated OEM/admin WIP, so full gate was verified in a clean detached worktree with only HF-1 scoped files applied. Temporary worktree dependency repairs were not copied into this repo.

tasks.title: QB-3 — Fuzzy phone customer search
tasks.goal: Quote Builder customer picker shares HF-1 ranked search semantics with phone-digit matching, phone-first ranking, and protected v_rep_customers one-row-per-company behavior.

tasks.notes: Main working tree has unrelated OEM/admin WIP and duplicate untracked migration numbers, so migration/order and full segment gates were verified in a clean detached worktree with only A5.1 scoped files applied.

tasks.title: HF-2 — Voice-note dropdown contrast
tasks.goal: Customer picker input and option rows use token-based classes so dropdown text, hover, and focus states are readable in light and dark themes.

tasks.notes: Roadmap names VoiceNoteCapture, but shipped HF-1 extracted the relevant picker to CustomerPickerInline. Main working tree has unrelated OEM/admin WIP and duplicate untracked migration numbers, so full gate ran in a clean detached worktree with only HF-2 scoped files applied.

tasks.title: Extend native e-signature to invoices + rental contracts

Temporary gate worktree used env from .env.local and temporary dev deps for existing gate prerequisites; those dependency repairs were not copied into the repo.

tasks.title: LLM strings through email-voice skill or human edit
tasks.goal: Generated user-facing email drafts carry a machine-checkable E2.2 voice gate and cannot be sent or marked sent until human edited or email-voice passed, with Decision Room drafts gated before copy/mailto.
verification: Oracle review found one P1 fake-edited bypass; targeted fix applied
bun run migrations:check (clean temp worktree, sequence 001..607)
bun run segment:gates --segment E2.2-core-voice-gate --ui (clean temp worktree)
tasks.notes: No skills/email-voice implementation exists in-repo, so E2.2 is enforced as a persisted context.voice_gate contract with human-edit default and email_voice_passed future status. Main working tree has unrelated OEM/admin/price/sales WIP and duplicate untracked migrations, so full gates ran in a clean detached worktree with only E2.2 scoped files applied. Price-intelligence/OEM draft wiring remains excluded because those files are currently unrelated WIP.

tasks.title: Supersession detection
tasks.goal: Scope-change watcher marks decisions as superseded when their gated tasks are descoped, completed, or rescoped, while preserving historical decision scope.
verification: Oracle review: no P0/P1 blocking findings
bun run migrations:check (clean temp worktree, sequence 001..608)
bun run segment:gates --segment F4.4-decision-supersession-watcher --ui (clean temp worktree)
tasks.notes: Implemented DB-native watcher only. roadmap-linear-sync is currently untracked local tooling, so supersession enforcement lives in Supabase migration code. Main working tree has unrelated OEM/admin/price/sales WIP and duplicate untracked migrations, so full gates ran in a clean detached worktree with only F4.4 scoped files applied.

tasks.title: M2 — Live spec sheet from structured source
tasks.goal: Quote Builder spec output uses structured manufacturer-ingested catalog specs instead of free-text bullets, with searchable catalog projection and consistent per-model quote/PDF metadata.
verification: Oracle review found two P1 blockers; targeted fixes applied for descriptor-only specs and manufacturer source proof
bun run migrations:check (clean temp worktree, sequence 001..608)
bun run segment:gates --segment A3.2-live-structured-specs --ui (clean temp worktree)
tasks.notes: No migration required; reused existing qb_equipment_models.specs and quote-line metadata/PDF renderer. Main working tree has unrelated admin/OEM/price/sales WIP and duplicate untracked migrations, so full gates ran in a clean detached worktree with only A3.2 scoped files applied. Spec fallback search is bounded/local for this slice; large catalogs may later need indexed DB search.

tasks.title: M5 — Branded acceptance flow
tasks.goal: Public Deal Room acceptance now includes durable customer acceptance proof plus internal rep follow-up evidence while avoiding unfinished live Stripe/deposit collection claims.
verification: Oracle initial review found two P1 blockers; targeted fixes applied for durable retry dedupe and latest sent-rep ownership; Oracle follow-up found no remaining P0/P1 blockers
bun run migrations:check (clean temp worktree, sequence 001..608)
bun run segment:gates --segment A3.5-public-acceptance-evidence --ui (clean temp worktree)
remaining_gaps: Live Stripe/deposit collection remains gated by deposit SOP and Stripe readiness.
Production deployed customer acceptance against live Supabase has not been verified in this slice.
A3.5 should remain in_progress until live deposit/payment scope is implemented or formally descoped.
tasks.notes: This is the second A3.5 partial slice, building on the prior public acceptance hardening commit. Public accept side effects are best-effort and durably deduped by quote/signature so share-token retries do not spam rep notifications or timeline events. Main working tree has unrelated admin/OEM/price/sales WIP and duplicate untracked migrations, so full gates ran in a clean detached worktree with only scoped quote-builder-v2 files applied.

current_cycle.title: M10 — QR landing page with NPS feedback

work_items.goal: Add additive feedback persistence plus public feedback and idempotent share-token Edge API foundation
work_items.done_when: Migration applies cleanly; token-gated public feedback endpoint validates/dedupes/persists feedback, writes nps_response lifecycle event, pings rep when resolvable; ensure-share-token returns stable public URL without rotating existing token; focused Deno checks/tests pass.
work_items.review_summary: PASS after reviewer/Oracle fixes: migration FK targets corrected to crm tables; public feedback uses centralized readable-status/readiness gate; duplicate feedback retries repair missing lifecycle/rep notification side effects; migrations:check, deno check, quote-public-safety test, audit:edges passed.

work_items.goal: Add DealRoom branded landing action hub, feedback form, and valid signature accept UI
work_items.done_when: /q/:token page shows quote status/actions/latest PDF/contact/feedback; submits three-question feedback via new API with clientSubmissionId dedupe; accept flow captures real PNG signature; focused runtime tests pass.
work_items.review_summary: PASS after P1 fixes: submit-time clientSubmissionId fallback, storage-safe success handling, latest PDF CTA gated on URL+version, valid PNG accept signature retained.

work_items.goal: Generate quote-specific QR codes and embed QR landing link in immutable customer-send PDFs
work_items.done_when: Email send ensures public link before PDF generation; immutable PDF snapshot uses QR-enriched data; static QR remains fallback; QR module has focused tests/type coverage.
work_items.review_summary: PASS after P1 fixes: unsafe QR hosts rejected, QR quiet zone rendered in PDF, focused quote-qr tests pass, email send uses QR-enriched immutable PDF data.

work_items.goal: Integrated review, release gates, deploy, and roadmap update
work_items.done_when: Oracle/reviewer passes integrated flow; required gates pass; migration/edge/client deployed if prerequisites allow; roadmap task shipped or blocked with manual task logged.
